description_long: This is a modern four-door police car with a robust, muscular build and a distinctive two-tone paint scheme. The body is primarily dark blue with light blue doors, and it features prominent 'STATE POLICE' markings and a police shield insignia on the front doors. The vehicle is equipped with a roof-mounted light bar, grille guards, and side mirrors, as well as chrome-finished wheels and visible emergency lights. The windows are tinted, and the rear of the car displays a license plate and additional police markings. The overall design is functional and authoritative, suitable for law enforcement duties in urban environments.
description: A modern, two-tone blue police car with 'STATE POLICE' markings, emergency lights, and a roof-mounted light bar.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille guard, windshield, side mirrors, and part of the roof light bar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'STATE POLICE' text, police shield insignia, and chrome wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the license plate, taillights, and rear police markings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible police insignia and emergency lights.
attribute_police_markings: The vehicle has 'STATE POLICE' text in white on both front doors and the rear trunk. There is a police shield insignia on the front doors. The license plate area also features a code. The markings are clear, bold, and designed for high visibility.
attribute_emergency_lights: A roof-mounted light bar is present, with red and blue segments. Additional small emergency lights are integrated into the front grille and rear of the vehicle.
attribute_police_insignia: A police shield insignia is visible on both front doors, featuring a blue and white design.
attribute_license_plate: A license plate is visible on the rear of the vehicle, colored white with blue text and the code 'COG 498'.
